song.title: The Way
song.author: Josh White
song.presentation: V1 P1 C V2 P2 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .E C#m G# G#7 Give me words to praise You and love to love You .E C#m G# G#7 But it has to be You .E C#m G# G#7 Take away the selfishness take away the pride .E C#m G# G#7 But it has to be You
[P1] .A B C#m You are the only way I'll go, You are the only truth I know
[C] . A E B A E B You are the way, the truth, and the life. . A E B You are the only way for me . C#m C#m/D# (E C#m G# G#7) And Jesus Your love is a mystery
[V2] Give me knowledge to know You and power to serve You But it has to be You Take away the fear, take away the shame But it has to be You
[P2] .A B C#m You are the only way I’ll go, You are only truth I know . C#m/D# E You are the only life worth living for
